name: cloudvigil
description: CloudVigil — Cloud-native API Monitoring & Analytics Dashboard

scripts.dev: concurrently --names SERVER,CLIENT --prefix-colors blue,magenta "npm run server" "npm run client"
scripts.install:all: cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.build: cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install && npm run build

author: CloudVigil Team
